---
title: "Hayes Waddell"
about:
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/profilepic.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/hayes-waddell2
    - icon: linkedin
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/hayes-waddell
---

::: {#intro-heading}
Baseball has always meant more to me than any single dimension of it. I played collegiately at Macalester College, have spent six years coaching youth players from 8 to 17 years old, and have spent just as much time buried in Statcast data and building models as I have on the field. That combination — player, coach, analyst — is the lens I bring to everything I do in this game.
 
I believe the best baseball minds are the ones who can move fluidly between a spreadsheet and a conversation with a player. Data without context is noise. Intuition without data is guesswork. My goal is to work in an organization that values both, and to be the kind of person who bridges that gap.
 
I'm finishing my M.S. in Data Science in December 2025, building on a B.A. in Neuroscience and Data Science from Macalester. The projects and writing on this site reflect how I think about baseball — analytically, but always with the human side of the game in mind.

## Education

**M.S in Data Science** \| Rochester Institute of Technology <br> Expected December 2026

**B.A. in Neuroscience** \| Macalester College \\ May 2025 <br> Minors: Data Science, Biology, Psychology

## Playing Career

R.I.T \| 1 season
- Liberty League Champions, 2026

Macalester College \| 3 seasons
- All-Region Third Team, 2024
- All-MIAC First Team, 2024
:::
